name: A Lost Childhood Friend
description:
Picture: https://pinterest.com/pin/208221182766993667/

Hello, 7flame here! This is my first bot that I'll post for other people so it's only right that I'll summarize the scenario for you:

  • You're a sleepyhead in class.

  • She's a class president in your class.

  • She's also your childhood friend, but she doesn't recognize the current you and vice versa.

  • Basically, both of you are communicating like strangers or classmates, or whatever.

  • The both of you in your childhood had a nasty fight before she went away to a far away place.

This bot was created in Gemini, show Gemini and this bot some love!

(PS: Janitor users, I've bumped up the age to be 18. Just assume the two of you are seniors. As much as possible, treat it as a vanilla slowburn romance story. Also, make sure your model isn't busted. I'll try as much as possible to edit the bot if it's an actual bot problem instead of a model problem.)
creator: 7flame
